name: host-git-cred-proxy
description: Reuse host Git HTTPS credentials inside Docker containers on macOS.

scripts.check: bash -n host/start.sh && bash -n host/stop.sh && bash -n host/status.sh && bash -n container/configure-git.sh && bash -n container/git-credential-hostproxy && node --check host/server.mjs && node --check container/helper.mjs
